Driven by ambition and filled with natural charisma, Barnum strikes out on his own path creating a Museum of Curiosities, featuring a cast of people society considers freaks, creating a stage for them, he achieved success beyond his wildest dreams, but risks losing it all when he forgets why he wanted it in the first place.
